---
title: "Skill Authority Report"
generated_at: "2026-03-26 12:49:33"
authoritative_root: ".agents/skills"
---

# Skill Authority Report

`.agents/skills/` is the authoritative woven-skill registry for Phase 1.
Any `src/skills/local/` surface is transitional and must be classified rather than guessed.

- Authoritative skills: `58`
- Transitional local entries: `13`
- Duplicate definitions: `4`
- Active capability authority issues: `0`

## Authoritative Registry

### _archive
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/_archive`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `none`
- Runtime Trigger: `_archive`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `none`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### agentic-ingest
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/agentic-ingest`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/agentic-ingest/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `agentic-ingest`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/agentic-ingest/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_intelligence_contract.py, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/engine/test_vector_ingest.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py`

### annex
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/annex`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/annex/scripts/annex.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/annex/annex.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `annex`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/annex/annex.feature`
- Tests: `tests/contracts/test_annex.py, tests/empire_tests/test_annex_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_annex_preservation_empire.py`

### autobot
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/autobot`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/autobot/scripts/autobot.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/autobot/contract.json`
- Runtime Trigger: `autobot`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/autobot/contract.json`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_autobot_runtime.test.ts`

### bifrost
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/bifrost`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/bifrost/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `bifrost`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/bifrost/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_bifrost.py, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py`

### bookmark-weaver
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/bookmark-weaver`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/bookmark-weaver/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `bookmark-weaver`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/bookmark-weaver/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### cachebro
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/cachebro`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/cachebro/cachebro.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `cachebro`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/cachebro/cachebro.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### calculus
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/calculus`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/calculus/scripts/calculus.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/calculus/calculus.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `calculus`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/calculus/calculus.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_vector_calculus.py, tests/crucible/test_gungnir_calculus_edges.py, tests/unit/test_gungnir_schema.py, tests/unit/test_gungnir_schema.test.ts`

### chant
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/chant`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/chant/scripts/chant.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/chant/chant.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `chant`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/chant/chant.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_chant_runtime.test.ts, tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_chant.test.ts`

### chronicle
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/chronicle`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/chronicle/scripts/chronicle.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/chronicle/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `chronicle`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/chronicle/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### consciousness
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/consciousness`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/consciousness/scripts/consciousness.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/consciousness/consciousness.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `consciousness`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/consciousness/consciousness.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### corvus-control
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/corvus-control`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/corvus-control/corvus-control.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `corvus-control`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/corvus-control/corvus-control.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_coordinator.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_git_spoke.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_muninn_hunter.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_ravens_cycle.py`

### distill
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/distill`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/distill/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `distill`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/distill/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_distill_runtime.test.ts`

### edda
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/edda`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/edda/scripts/edda.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/edda/edda.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `edda`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/edda/edda.feature`
- Tests: `tests/contracts/test_edda.py, tests/empire_tests/test_edda_audit_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_edda_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_edda_syntax_empire.py`

### empire
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/empire`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/empire/scripts/empire.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/empire/empire.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `empire`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/empire/empire.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_atomic_gpt_empire.py, tests/unit/test_cognitive_router_empire.py, tests/unit/test_heimdall_shield_empire.py, tests/unit/test_lease_manager_empire.py`

### engine
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/engine`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/engine/engine.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `engine`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/engine/engine.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_coordinator.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_git_spoke.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_muninn_hunter.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_ravens_cycle.py`

### evolve
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/evolve`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/evolve/scripts/evolve.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/evolve/contract.json`
- Runtime Trigger: `evolve`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/evolve/contract.json`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_evolve_runtime.test.ts`

### forge
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/forge`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/forge/scripts/forge.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/forge/forge.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `forge`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/forge/forge.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_forge_candidate.py, tests/unit/test_taliesin_forge_runtime.test.ts, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_ravens_runtime.py, tests/unit/node-runtime/adapters/test_legacy_commands.test.ts`

### gatekeeper
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/gatekeeper`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/gatekeeper/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `gatekeeper`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/gatekeeper/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### gherkin
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/gherkin`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/gherkin/gherkin.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `gherkin`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/gherkin/gherkin.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### hall
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/hall`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/hall/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `hall`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/hall/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_hall_schema.py, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py`

### hunt
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/hunt`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/hunt/scripts/hunt.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/hunt/hunt.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `hunt`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/hunt/hunt.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_mimir_client.py, tests/unit/test_mimir_client_bridge.test.ts, tests/unit/test_mimir_gateway.test.ts, tests/empire_tests/test_mimir_aesthetics_empire.py`

### jailing
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/jailing`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/jailing/scripts/jailing.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/jailing/jailing.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `jailing`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/jailing/jailing.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### level-5-diagnostic
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/level-5-diagnostic`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/level-5-diagnostic/level-5-diagnostic.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `level-5-diagnostic`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/level-5-diagnostic/level-5-diagnostic.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### linter
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/linter`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/linter/scripts/linter.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/linter/linter.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `linter`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/linter/linter.feature`
- Tests: `tests/empire_tests/test_prompt_linter_empire.py`

### locks
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/locks`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/locks/scripts/locks.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/locks/locks.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `locks`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/locks/locks.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### manifest
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/manifest`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/manifest/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `manifest`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/manifest/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_skill_registry_audit.py, tests/unit/test_state_registry_projection.test.ts, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py`

### matrix
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/matrix`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/matrix/scripts/matrix.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/matrix/matrix.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `matrix`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/matrix/matrix.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### metrics
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/metrics`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/metrics/scripts/metrics.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/metrics/metrics.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `metrics`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/metrics/metrics.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_metrics_engine.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_coordinator.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_git_spoke.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_muninn_hunter.py`

### mimir
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/mimir`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/mimir/mimir.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `mimir`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/mimir/mimir.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_mimir_client.py, tests/unit/test_mimir_client_bridge.test.ts, tests/unit/test_mimir_gateway.test.ts, tests/empire_tests/test_mimir_aesthetics_empire.py`

### norn
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/norn`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/norn/scripts/norn.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/norn/norn.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `norn`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/norn/norn.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_norn_coordinator_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_norn_campaign_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_norn_empire.py`

### one-mind
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/one-mind`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/one-mind/one-mind.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `one-mind`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/one-mind/one-mind.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_intelligence_contract.py, tests/unit/test_mimir_client.py, tests/unit/test_mimir_client_bridge.test.ts, tests/unit/test_intelligence_contract.test.ts`

### oracle
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/oracle`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/oracle/scripts/oracle.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/oracle/oracle.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `oracle`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/oracle/oracle.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_oracle_command.test.ts, tests/unit/test_runtime_command_invocations.test.ts`

### orchestrate
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/orchestrate`
- Entrypoint: `src/node/core/runtime/weaves/orchestrate.ts`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/orchestrate/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `orchestrate`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/orchestrate/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_host_governor.test.ts, tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_host_worker.test.ts, tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_architect.test.ts, tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_chant.test.ts`

### personas
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/personas`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/personas/scripts/personas.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/personas/personas.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `personas`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/personas/personas.feature`
- Tests: `tests/empire_tests/test_contextual_persona.py, tests/empire_tests/test_persona_logic_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_personas_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_personas_retheme_empire.py`

### promotion
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/promotion`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/promotion/scripts/promotion.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/promotion/promotion.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `promotion`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/promotion/promotion.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_muninn_promotion.py`

### qmd_search
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/qmd_search`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/qmd_search/scripts/qmd_search.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/qmd_search/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `qmd_search`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/qmd_search/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/quarantine/test_brave_search.py, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py`

### ravens
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/ravens`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/ravens/scripts/ravens.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/ravens/ravens.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `ravens`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/ravens/ravens.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_muninn_hunter.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_coordinator.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_git_spoke.py, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_ravens_cycle.py`

### redactor
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/redactor`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/redactor/scripts/redactor.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/redactor/redactor.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `redactor`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/redactor/redactor.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### report
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/report`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/report/scripts/report.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/report/report.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `report`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/report/report.feature`
- Tests: `tests/empire_tests/test_compile_failure_report_empire.py, tests/empire_tests/test_report_engine_empire.py, tests/quarantine/test_report_engine.py`

### research
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/research`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/research/scripts/research.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/research/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `research`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/research/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/node-runtime/weaves/test_research.test.ts`

### ritual
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/ritual`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/ritual/scripts/ritual.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/ritual/ritual.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `ritual`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/ritual/ritual.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### scan
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/scan`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/scan/scripts/scan.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/scan/scan.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `scan`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/scan/scan.feature`
- Tests: `tests/empire_tests/test_security_scan_empire.py, tests/node/pennyone/scan_logic.test.ts`

### scribe
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/scribe`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/scribe/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `scribe`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/scribe/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### spoke
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/spoke`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/spoke/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `spoke`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/spoke/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_spoke_runtime.test.ts`

### sprt
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/sprt`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/sprt/scripts/sprt.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/sprt/sprt.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `sprt`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/sprt/sprt.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### stability
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/stability`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/stability/scripts/stability.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/stability/stability.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `stability`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/stability/stability.feature`
- Tests: `tests/quarantine/test_stability.py`

### start
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/start`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/start/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `start`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `bounded-orchestrator`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/start/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_start_runtime.test.ts`

### status
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/status`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/status/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `status`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/status/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_runtime_command_invocations.test.ts, tests/unit/engine/ravens/test_ravens_runtime.py, tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/health_disk.test.ts`

### sterling
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/sterling`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/sterling/scripts/sterling.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/sterling/sterling.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `sterling`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/sterling/sterling.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_sterling_auditor.py`

### style
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/style`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/style/scripts/style.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/style/style.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `style`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/style/style.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### taliesin
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/taliesin`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/taliesin/scripts/taliesin.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/taliesin/taliesin.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `taliesin`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/taliesin/taliesin.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/test_taliesin.py`

### taste-skill
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/taste-skill`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/taste-skill/taste-skill.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `taste-skill`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/taste-skill/taste-skill.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/engine/wardens/test_taste.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py`

### telemetry
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/telemetry`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/telemetry/scripts/telemetry.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/telemetry/telemetry.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `telemetry`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/telemetry/telemetry.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/node-runtime/test_telemetry.test.ts, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py`

### trace
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/trace`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/trace/scripts/trace.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/trace/trace.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `trace`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/trace/trace.feature`
- Tests: `tests/empire_tests/test_trace_viz_empire.py`

### visual-explainer
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/visual-explainer`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/visual-explainer/visual-explainer.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `visual-explainer`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/visual-explainer/visual-explainer.feature`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/test_autobot_skill.py, tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py, tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py`

### vitals
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/vitals`
- Entrypoint: `none`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/vitals/SKILL.md`
- Runtime Trigger: `vitals`
- Owner Runtime: `host-agent`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "native-session", "codex": "exec-bridge", "claude": "exec-bridge"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/vitals/SKILL.md`
- Tests: `tests/unit/engine/test_skill_learning.py, tests/unit/health_disk.test.ts, tests/unit/health_memory.test.ts, tests/unit/health_overall.test.ts`

### warden
- Authority Path: `.agents/skills/warden`
- Entrypoint: `.agents/skills/warden/scripts/warden.py`
- Contract: `.agents/skills/warden/warden.feature`
- Runtime Trigger: `warden`
- Owner Runtime: `cstar-kernel`
- Host Support: `{"gemini": "supported", "codex": "supported", "claude": "supported"}`
- Recursion Policy: `leaf`
- Contracts: `.agents/skills/warden/warden.feature`
- Tests: `tests/quarantine/test_base_warden.py, tests/quarantine/test_freya_warden.py, tests/quarantine/test_session_warden_determinism_empire.py, tests/quarantine/test_warden_burnin.py`

## Transitional Local Skills

### CacheBro
- Path: `src/skills/local/CacheBro`
- Migration Status: `wrap`
- Authority Alias: `cachebro`

### dormancy
- Path: `src/skills/local/dormancy.py`
- Migration Status: `bootstrap-only`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### Environment
- Path: `src/skills/local/Environment`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### GitHub
- Path: `src/skills/local/GitHub`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### KnowledgeHunter
- Path: `src/skills/local/KnowledgeHunter`
- Migration Status: `wrap`
- Authority Alias: `hunt`

### oracle
- Path: `src/skills/local/oracle`
- Migration Status: `wrap`
- Authority Alias: `oracle`

### persona-audit
- Path: `src/skills/local/persona-audit`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### radon
- Path: `src/skills/local/radon`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### skill-scout
- Path: `src/skills/local/skill-scout`
- Migration Status: `retire`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### SkillLearning
- Path: `src/skills/local/SkillLearning`
- Migration Status: `wrap`
- Authority Alias: `evolve`

### VisualExplainer
- Path: `src/skills/local/VisualExplainer`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### WildHunt
- Path: `src/skills/local/WildHunt`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

### workflow_analyst
- Path: `src/skills/local/workflow_analyst`
- Migration Status: `migrate`
- Authority Alias: `none`

## Active Capability Authority Issues

- No active capability authority issues detected.
## Duplicate Definitions

- `CacheBro` -> `cachebro`
  Local: `src/skills/local/CacheBro`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/cachebro`
- `KnowledgeHunter` -> `hunt`
  Local: `src/skills/local/KnowledgeHunter`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/hunt`
- `oracle` -> `oracle`
  Local: `src/skills/local/oracle`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/oracle`
- `SkillLearning` -> `evolve`
  Local: `src/skills/local/SkillLearning`
  Authority: `.agents/skills/evolve`
